stemHtml: Which option is correct as regards checking the availability of the GNSS service for flights that will rely on GNSS information for guidance?

options.a: Satellites may NOT be available due to terrain and/or antenna masking.
options.b: Satellites may NOT be available due to the status of the constellation.
options.c: The availability of satellites is dependent on ground-based navigation aids.
options.d: The availability of satellites is dependent on the aircraft's equipment.
